name: League Rewind
oneLiner: Auto-generates a shareable recap of your fantasy football league's week.
description: Your fantasy football league's week, turned into a shareable recap — highest scorer, closest matchup, the bench points that would've won it. Generate it Tuesday morning, drop it in the group chat, start the trash talk.

name: Closed
oneLiner: A clean tracker for sales commission and on-target earnings.
description: A clean tracker for sales commission and on-target earnings. Log deals as they close and always know where you stand against quota — no spreadsheet gymnastics, no guessing what the check will be.

name: P10
oneLiner: An F1 fantasy game: you and your friends predict the P10 finisher each race.
description: An F1 fantasy game for you and your friends: before each race, everyone predicts who finishes tenth. Deceptively simple, weirdly strategic, and the best reason I know to care about the midfield.
